mapper.select: SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
SELECT * FROM sys_menu WHERE delete_flag = 0 ORDER BY order_num
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = #{parentId}, name = #{name}, path = #{path}, component = #{component}, perms = #{perms}, type = #{type}, icon = #{icon}, order_num = #{orderNum}, update_time = #{updateTime}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag} WHERE id = #{id}
